allow: PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Resources.Extensions; $rm = New-Object System.Resources.ResourceManager\("JAA.Resources.SharedResources", [System.Reflection.Assembly]::LoadFrom\("D:\\Downloads\\JAA_Restyled_Fixed\\JAA_Restyled\\bin\\Debug\\net8.0\\JAA.dll"\)\); try { $val = $rm.GetString\("Nav.Home", [System.Globalization.CultureInfo]::CreateSpecificCulture\("ar"\)\); Write-Host "Nav.Home \(ar\): '$val'" } catch { Write-Host "Error: $_" })

PowerShell($bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("D:\\Downloads\\JAA_Restyled_Fixed\\JAA_Restyled\\bin\\Debug\\net8.0\\ar\\JAA.resources.dll"\); $asm = [System.Reflection.Assembly]::Load\($bytes\); $stream = $asm.GetManifestResourceStream\("JAA.Resources.SharedResources.ar.resources"\); if \($stream\) { $reader = New-Object System.Resources.ResourceReader\($stream\); $entry = $reader.GetEnumerator\(\); $count = 0; while \($entry.MoveNext\(\) -and $count -lt 5\) { Write-Host "$\($entry.Key\) = $\($entry.Value\)"; $count++ } } else { Write-Host "Stream not found" })

PowerShell($bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("D:\\Downloads\\JAA_Restyled_Fixed\\JAA_Restyled\\bin\\Debug\\net8.0\\ar\\JAA.resources.dll"\); $asm = [System.Reflection.Assembly]::Load\($bytes\); $stream = $asm.GetManifestResourceStream\("JAA.Resources.SharedResources.ar.resources"\); $reader = New-Object System.Resources.ResourceReader\($stream\); $entry = $reader.GetEnumerator\(\); $found = $false; while \($entry.MoveNext\(\)\) { if \($entry.Key -eq "Nav.Home"\) { Write-Host "FOUND: Nav.Home = $\($entry.Value\)"; $found = $true; break } }; if \(-not $found\) { Write-Host "Nav.Home NOT FOUND in satellite" })
